<!--
  Thanks for contributing to QNSC! Please fill out this template so reviewers
  have the context they need. Keep PRs focused and reasonably small where possible.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe tests added/run, or manual verification steps. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the repo's linting and formatting conventions
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my changes
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive data are committed
- [ ] CI passes and at least one reviewer is assigned
